title: Bundle Recipe - Farmer's delight | 粗布合成收纳袋
description: Adding recipes for bundles using Farmer's Delight and Supplementaries
body:
Now **bundles** can be crafted using **canvas** from Farmer's Delight.
They can be dyed, and Supplementaries’ **soap** can wash the color off.

The recipe matches the latest vanilla change (1 string + 1 leather),
considering that canvas is thin, so triple-layer it is. (makes sense right)

Works on 1.20.x as well. Also recommend [this mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport), it backports some new features, but dyed bundles aren’t craftable there, this datapack restores the recipe.

**用农夫乐事的粗布可以合成收纳袋，** 也能染色，用锦致装饰的肥皂能洗掉。

对齐了原版最新小版本「1线+1皮革」的配方，粗布比较薄所以得叠三层（确信）（合理吧）

1.20.x也能用，另外推荐[这个mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport)，复刻了一些新东西，但彩色收纳袋合成不了，这个数据包里顺手把配方补上了。
